title: EnsemblesWebDAV
rawIndexableTextContent: A WebDAV cloud backend for Ensembles. Overview EnsemblesWebDAV provides WebDAVCloudFileSystem, an implementation of the Ensembles CloudFileSystem protocol that stores sync data on any WebDAV-compatible server. It uses standard HTTP WebDAV methods (PROPFIND, MKCOL, PUT, GET, DELETE) via URLSession — no third-party dependencies required. WebDAV is a widely supported protocol available on Nextcloud, ownCloud, Apache, nginx, IIS, and many NAS devices. This makes it a versatile backend for self-hosted sync. Authentication WebDAV supports Basic and Digest authentication. Pass credentials at initialization:  Digest authentication is handled automatically by URLSession’s HTTP challenge mechanism. For servers that require client certificates or other authentication schemes, configure a custom URLSession and credential. Setup Examples Nextcloud / ownCloud:  Generic WebDAV server:  No authentication (local development):  API Details The backend uses standard WebDAV HTTP methods. The baseURL is the root directory for all sync data — Ensembles creates its directory structure beneath it. Operation HTTP Method Connect PROPFIND / (depth 0) File existence PROPFIND /path (depth 0) Create directory MKCOL /path/ List directory PROPFIND /path/ (depth 1) Remove item DELETE /path Upload PUT /path Download GET /path  Error Handling HTTP status codes are mapped to EnsembleError cases: 401 Unauthorized and 403 Forbidden map to EnsembleError.authenticationFailure. 404 Not Found maps to EnsembleError.fileAccessFailed. Other HTTP errors map to EnsembleError.serverError. Server Compatibility Notes Nextcloud/ownCloud: Use the full WebDAV path including /remote.php/dav/files/username/. Generate an app-specific password rather than using your login password. Apache mod_dav: Ensure the MKCOL method is allowed and the directory is writable. nginx: Requires the ngx_http_dav_module or nginx-dav-ext-module for full WebDAV support. Dependencies This module has no external dependencies beyond Foundation and the core Ensembles framework. All network communication uses URLSession.
summary: A WebDAV cloud backend for Ensembles.

title: WebDAVCloudFileSystem
rawIndexableTextContent: A cloud file system backed by a WebDAV server using URLSession.  Overview No third-party dependencies — uses standard HTTP methods (PROPFIND, MKCOL, PUT, GET, DELETE). Authentication is handled via URLCredential, supporting both Basic and Digest auth (Digest is handled automatically by URLSession’s HTTP challenge mechanism). Setup Nextcloud / ownCloud  Generate an app password in Nextcloud under Settings → Security → Devices & sessions. Do not use your login password directly — app passwords are safer and can be revoked independently. Generic WebDAV Server  Both Basic and Digest authentication are supported. Digest auth is handled automatically by URLSession’s built-in HTTP challenge mechanism — no additional configuration is needed.
summary: A cloud file system backed by a WebDAV server using URLSession.

title: contentsOfDirectory(atPath:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Returns the contents of a directory at the given path as an array of CloudItem values.
summary: Returns the contents of a directory at the given path as an array of CloudItem values.

title: downloadFile(atPath:toLocalFile:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Downloads a file from the cloud file system to a local path.  The path of the file in the cloud file system. The destination path on the local device.
summary: Downloads a file from the cloud file system to a local path.

title: removeItem(atPath:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Removes the item (file or directory) at the given path.
summary: Removes the item (file or directory) at the given path.

title: init(baseURL:username:password:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a WebDAV cloud file system with the given base URL.  The root URL of the WebDAV server. Optional username for authentication. Optional password for authentication.
summary: Creates a WebDAV cloud file system with the given base URL.

title: uploadLocalFile(atPath:toPath:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Uploads a local file to the cloud file system.  The path to the file on the local device. The destination path in the cloud file system.
summary: Uploads a local file to the cloud file system.

title: username
rawIndexableTextContent: The username, derived from the credential.
summary: The username, derived from the credential.

title: fetchUserIdentity()
rawIndexableTextContent: Fetches a token representing the current user of the cloud file system. Often this will be the user or login name.
summary: Fetches a token representing the current user of the cloud file system. Often this will be the user or login name.

title: createDirectory(atPath:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a directory at the given path.
summary: Creates a directory at the given path.

title: fileExists(atPath:)
rawIndexableTextContent: Determines whether a file exists at the given path, and whether it is a directory.
summary: Determines whether a file exists at the given path, and whether it is a directory.

title: connect()
rawIndexableTextContent: Attempts to connect to the cloud backend.
summary: Attempts to connect to the cloud backend.

title: baseURL
rawIndexableTextContent: The base URL of the WebDAV server (e.g., https://cloud.example.com/remote.php/dav/files/user/).
summary: The base URL of the WebDAV server (e.g., https://cloud.example.com/remote.php/dav/files/user/).

title: isConnected
rawIndexableTextContent: Whether the file system is connected and ready for file transactions.
summary: Whether the file system is connected and ready for file transactions.
